title: Simplified Dragon Egg
description: Simplifies the dragon egg's shape and updates its texture.
body:
This pack alters the dragon egg's model and texture to make it more in line with minecraft's current style, with a simplified shape and updated texture, while preserving some it's original curvature. The pack also adds an item icon to the dragon egg. 

**Extra details**

- the current version of the pack is compatible with 1.21.9 to 26.1;
- the zip file can just be dragged and dropped in your "resourcepacks" folder, unzipping isn't required.
